name: AUKUS
climate: Diverse: temperate maritime (GBR), continental and arid (AUS), varied (USA); alliance focused on Indo-Pacific maritime domain

neighbors.name: Five Eyes
neighbors.relevance: All three AUKUS members are Five Eyes partners; intelligence sharing foundation

neighbors.name: Quadrilateral Security Dialogue
neighbors.relevance: USA and Australia overlap; AUKUS defense tech supports Quad strategic goals

neighbors.name: Indo-Pacific
neighbors.relevance: AUKUS is explicitly designed for Indo-Pacific deterrence and security

neighbors.name: South China Sea
neighbors.relevance: Primary operational theater for AUKUS submarine and maritime capabilities

neighbors.name: ASEAN
neighbors.relevance: ASEAN nations are concerned about AUKUS impact on regional arms dynamics

links.description: AUKUS is the defense-industrial subset of the broader Five Eyes alliance
USA and Australia in both; AUKUS military capabilities enable Quad strategic posture
AUKUS submarine patrols and advanced capabilities focused on South China Sea deterrence
AUKUS deterrence posture supports Taiwan Strait stability and semiconductor access
AUKUS maritime domain awareness covers Malacca Strait, critical for regional trade
USA and UK bridge AUKUS to G7 technology and security policy coordination
